logs.title: Scheduler Logs
logs.selectHint: Select an attempt on the left to view logs

worker.title: Worker Management
worker.batchDeployHint: Use SSH to install ticket-worker, import its config, start it, and register it in this employer. SSH passwords are used only for this deployment and are not stored.
worker.deployImportCsvTitle: Import Target Servers from Quick CSV
worker.deployCsvHint: Quick CSV accepts one server per line: username, IP/host, SSH password. Two columns are parsed as IP/host, SSH password and reuse the previous username; one column reuses the previous username and password. Empty fields also reuse the previous field value. Lines starting with # are comments.
worker.deployJsonHint: JSON import only fills the target server table above. It does not overwrite Worker file source or advanced options below. You can enter a targets array or an object containing a targets array.
worker.deployConcurrencyHint: Number of servers deployed in parallel; it does not affect ticketing concurrency.
worker.deploySaveTrafficHint: Compress the local worker binary as tar.gz before uploading. The remote server must have tar.
worker.deployNeedTarget: Please enter at least one target server
worker.deployNeedSSHKey: Please select or enter an SSH private key path for {host}
worker.deployNeedLocalBinary: Please select or enter a local worker binary path
worker.deployNeedLocalPackage: Please select or enter a local worker file path
worker.deployNeedDownloadUrl: Please enter a remote download URL
worker.deployCsvTooManyFields: Line {line} has too many fields; at most 3 columns are supported
worker.deployJsonRootInvalid: JSON must be a targets array or an object containing a targets array
worker.importHint: Paste the encoded config generated by ticket-worker below.
worker.importLocalRejected: 'local' is a reserved Worker ID and cannot be imported. Please regenerate the config with a different ID.
worker.versionMismatchWarning: The worker and employer have different protocol versions. The connection was rejected. Forcing the connection may cause unpredictable behavior.
worker.versionMismatchRisk: ⛔ WARNING: Bypassing the version check may cause data corruption, order failures, or other undefined behavior! Only use this if you are certain the two versions are compatible.
worker.overrideAddressHint: Real IP:port if different from the config
worker.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete worker "{name}"?
worker.deleteWarning: The worker will no longer participate in ticketing.
worker.editHint: Modify connection address and role for Worker「{name}」:
worker.userTagsHint: Press Enter to add a tag. local/remote are system tags and are not saved as user tags.
worker.forceReconnectSubtitle: Bypass protocol version check and force the connection (unsafe)
worker.reconnectLocked: Reconnect locked due to protocol version mismatch
worker.addLocalHint: Create a new in-process local worker:
worker.skipVersionCheckDesc: Protocol version check bypassed — employer and worker versions differ; unpredictable behavior may occur
worker.generateConfigHint: Generate a distributable Base4096-encoded config for a remote worker, including TLS certs and connection parameters.
worker.configIdHint: Unique identifier for the remote worker, e.g. home-server
worker.configIdReserved: 'local' is a reserved name, please use a different ID
worker.configHostsHint: Leave blank to use Worker ID, or specify e.g. myhost.example.com,192.168.1.100
worker.configAddConfirmHint: Import this worker now? The import dialog will open with the config pre-filled.

taskGroup.projectIdHelp: Find it in the event ticket page URL
taskGroup.customStartAtHint: Leave empty to use the default sale start; auto-filled when a SKU is selected
taskGroup.pgEmpty: No purchase groups — select buyers and click add
taskGroup.pgMaxBuyers: You can select at most {max} buyer(s)
taskGroup.pgAddHint: Select buyers and click the button below:
taskGroup.pgNoBuyers: No buyers available, go to Buyer Management first
taskGroup.pgAllowSplitHint: Allow splitting buyers into individual orders during reflow
taskGroup.reflowStockCheck: Enable pre-order stock check during reflow
taskGroup.reflowStockCheckHint: When enabled, stock will be checked before each order submission; skip if out of stock
taskGroup.groupAccountsHint: These accounts are reserved when the task group starts; dispatch only uses this pool.
taskGroup.groupPrimaryWorkersHint: These workers are reserved when the task group starts and receive assignments first.
taskGroup.groupStandbyWorkersHint: Also reserved when the group starts; used only after primary workers fail.
taskGroup.editLockedHint: The task group is running. Stop it before editing macros, purchase groups, or worker config.
taskGroup.noAccountsConfigured: Select accounts in task group dispatch config first
taskGroup.noWorkersConfigured: Select workers in task group dispatch config first
taskGroup.addMacroConfirmNote: Incorrect date may cause failure. Click Confirm to proceed.
taskGroup.macroPrimaryWorkersHint: Leave empty to allow any worker selected for the task group
taskGroup.macroStandbyWorkersHint: Used for this macro only when primary workers are insufficient
taskGroup.pgPriorityHint: Higher values receive remainder slots first
taskGroup.blockerNoBuyerMapping: Buyers not synced to any account — sync in Buyer Management

account.title: Account Management
account.importHint: Paste exported account credentials below. Single-account JSON and JSON arrays are both supported.
account.importPlaceholder: Paste the full account credential JSON or JSON array...
account.exportHint: The JSON below can be imported back on the Account Management page. Keep it safe and do not share it with untrusted people.
account.qrHint: Click the button below to generate a QR code, then scan with Bilibili App
account.loginEmptyQR: Bilibili returned an empty login QR code. Please retry later.
account.safecenterVerifyRequired: Phone verification is required to finish this password login.
account.safecenterSMSSendFailed: Failed to send security SMS code: {error}
account.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete account "{name}"?
account.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} accounts?
account.deleteWarning: This account will no longer be available for ticketing.
account.editTagsHint: Select existing tags or type new tags directly.
account.batchAddTagsHint: Add these tags to the selected {count} accounts. Existing tags are kept and duplicates are ignored.
account.batchRemoveTagsHint: Remove these tags from the selected {count} accounts. Accounts without these tags will not change.
account.batchTagsPartialFailed: Some account tags failed to save: {error}

buyer.title: Buyer Management
buyer.editPhoneHint: Set a unified phone number for this buyer. This only updates the local record and will not sync to Bilibili accounts.
buyer.deleteHint: Leave accounts empty to remove from all; select specific accounts to remove only from those.
buyer.deleteTargetHint: Leave empty to delete from all accounts
buyer.syncToHint: Provision this buyer to the target Bilibili account.
buyer.formIncomplete: Please fill in name and select target account
buyer.batchSyncHint: Sync selected buyers to target account.

verified.instruction: Enter the required phrase and press Enter to continue:

scheduler.loginRequired: Please login first to manage tasks.
scheduler.emptyTickets: No tickets — click "Add Ticket" or go to

scheduler.chainTrigger: Chain switch: auto-start the next ticket for the same buyer & project after the current one is grabbed (real-name only)
scheduler.chainTriggerHint: Real-name tickets of the same buyer & project are queued below; drag to reorder

notify.title: Notification Channels
notify.emptyHint: No notification channels configured — add one to receive alerts on ticket success

settings.title: General Settings
settings.retryIntervalDesc: Set the wait time between each ticket attempt. Shorter intervals increase attempt frequency but may trigger platform risk control.
settings.lowDelayWarning: Low-latency mode (<500ms): High-frequency requests may trigger platform risk control. Use with caution.
settings.conservativeModeInfo: Conservative mode (≥500ms): Lower request frequency reduces risk control chance but may lower success rate.
settings.highIntervalWarning: At ≥1000ms, the attempt frequency is very low and you may miss the ticket window. Adjust according to actual conditions.
settings.startDelayDesc: Wait for a fixed period before entering the ticket loop. Can stagger multiple tasks to avoid instant request storms. Set to 0 to start immediately.
settings.startDelayWarning: Too small a value may cause risk control penalties. Configure start delay reasonably, especially when running multiple tasks.
settings.immediateStart: Immediate start: Enter the ticket loop right after task creation.
settings.lightDelay: Light delay (≤100ms): Wait briefly before starting.
settings.extendedDelay: Extended delay (≤500ms): Can stagger multiple task start times.
settings.clockOffsetDesc: Difference between local time and server time. Positive values mean local clock is behind the server. Ticket targeting time is automatically corrected.
settings.buyerManagerWorkersDesc: These workers are used to read account buyers and sync one buyer to multiple accounts. Selecting multiple workers allows multi-account sync to run in parallel.
settings.buyerManagerWorkersHint: Defaults to the local Worker. Remote Workers must be online and healthy to handle buyer-management RPCs.
